# Lettr API — endpoint catalog

Base URL `https://app.lettr.com/api` · Auth `Authorization: Bearer $LETTR_API_KEY`

Condensed from the OpenAPI spec — 38 paths. Request-body fields in **bold** are required. For full request/response schemas read the bundled [`openapi.json`](./openapi.json).

## Emails

### `POST /emails` — Send Email
op: `sendEmail` · body: SendEmailRequest { **from**, from_name, subject, **to**, cc, bcc, reply_to, reply_to_name, html, text, amp_html, project_id, template_slug, template_version, tag, metadata, headers, substitution_data, options, attachments } · errors: 400, 401, 404, 422, 429, 500, 502

### `GET /emails` — List Sent Emails
op: `listEmails` · errors: 400, 401, 422, 500

### `GET /emails/events` — List Email Events
op: `listEmailEvents` · errors: 401, 422, 500

### `GET /emails/{requestId}` — Get Email Detail
op: `getEmailDetail` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /emails/scheduled` — Schedule Email
op: `scheduleEmail` · body: ScheduleEmailRequest · errors: 400, 401, 403, 422, 429, 500, 502

### `GET /emails/scheduled/{transmissionId}` — Get Scheduled Email
op: `showScheduledEmail` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `DELETE /emails/scheduled/{transmissionId}` — Cancel Scheduled Email
op: `cancelScheduledEmail` · errors: 401, 403, 409, 500

## Templates

### `GET /templates` — List Templates
op: `listTemplates` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /templates` — Create Template
op: `createTemplate` · body: CreateTemplateRequest { **name**, project_id, folder_id, html, json } · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `GET /templates/{slug}` — Get Template
op: `getTemplate` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /templates/{slug}` — Delete Template
op: `deleteTemplate` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `PUT /templates/{slug}` — Update Template
op: `updateTemplate` · body: UpdateTemplateRequest { project_id, name, html, json } · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `GET /templates/{slug}/merge-tags` — Get Template Merge Tags
op: `getTemplateMergeTags` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `GET /templates/html` — Get Template HTML
op: `getTemplateHtml` · errors: 401, 404

## Domains

### `GET /domains` — List Domains
op: `listDomains` · errors: 401, 500

### `POST /domains` — Create Domain
op: `createDomain` · body: StoreDomainRequest { **domain** } · errors: 401, 409, 422, 500

### `GET /domains/{domain}` — Get Domain
op: `showDomain` · errors: 401, 404, 500

### `DELETE /domains/{domain}` — Delete Domain
op: `deleteDomain` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /domains/{domain}/verify` — Verify Domain
op: `verifyDomain` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

## Webhooks

### `GET /webhooks` — List Webhooks
op: `listWebhooks` · errors: 401, 500

### `POST /webhooks` — Create Webhook
op: `storeWebhook` · body: StoreWebhookRequest { **name**, **url**, **auth_type**, auth_username, auth_password, oauth_client_id, oauth_client_secret, oauth_token_url, **events_mode**, events } · errors: 400, 401, 409, 422, 500

### `GET /webhooks/{webhookId}` — Get Webhook
op: `showWebhook` · errors: 401, 404, 500

### `PUT /webhooks/{webhookId}` — Update Webhook
op: `updateWebhook` · body: UpdateWebhookRequest { name, url, target, auth_type, auth_username, auth_password, oauth_token_url, oauth_client_id, oauth_client_secret, events, active } · errors: 400, 401, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /webhooks/{webhookId}` — Delete Webhook
op: `deleteWebhook` · errors: 401, 404, 422, 500

## Audience

### `GET /audience/lists` — List audience lists
op: `listAudienceLists` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/lists` — Create an audience list
op: `createAudienceList` · body: StoreAudienceListRequest { **name** } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/lists/bulk` — Bulk delete audience lists
op: `bulkDestroyAudienceLists` · body: BulkDestroyAudienceListsRequest { **list_ids** } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `GET /audience/lists/{listId}` — Show an audience list
op: `showAudienceList` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `PATCH /audience/lists/{listId}` — Update an audience list
op: `updateAudienceList` · body: UpdateAudienceListRequest { name } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/lists/{listId}` — Delete an audience list
op: `destroyAudienceList` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `GET /audience/contacts` — List audience contacts
op: `listAudienceContacts` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/contacts` — Create a contact
op: `createAudienceContact` · body: StoreAudienceContactRequest { **email**, list_id, properties, double_opt_in } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500, 502

### `POST /audience/contacts/bulk` — Bulk create contacts
op: `bulkCreateAudienceContacts` · body: BulkStoreAudienceContactsRequest { **emails**, list_id, properties } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/contacts/lists/bulk` — Bulk attach contacts to lists
op: `bulkAttachContactsToLists` · body: BulkAudienceContactListsRequest { **contact_ids**, **list_ids** } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/contacts/lists/bulk` — Bulk detach contacts from lists
op: `bulkDetachContactsFromLists` · body: BulkAudienceContactListsRequest { **contact_ids**, **list_ids** } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `GET /audience/contacts/{contactId}` — Show a contact
op: `showAudienceContact` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `PATCH /audience/contacts/{contactId}` — Update a contact
op: `updateAudienceContact` · body: UpdateAudienceContactRequest { email, status, properties } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/contacts/{contactId}` — Delete a contact
op: `destroyAudienceContact` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `POST /audience/contacts/{contactId}/lists/{listId}` — Attach contact to list
op: `attachAudienceContactToList` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `DELETE /audience/contacts/{contactId}/lists/{listId}` — Detach contact from list
op: `detachAudienceContactFromList` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `POST /audience/contacts/{contactId}/topics/{topicId}` — Subscribe contact to topic
op: `subscribeAudienceContactToTopic` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `DELETE /audience/contacts/{contactId}/topics/{topicId}` — Unsubscribe contact from topic
op: `unsubscribeAudienceContactFromTopic` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `GET /audience/topics` — List audience topics
op: `listAudienceTopics` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/topics` — Create a topic
op: `createAudienceTopic` · body: StoreAudienceTopicRequest { **name**, description, default_subscription, visibility } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `GET /audience/topics/{topicId}` — Show a topic
op: `showAudienceTopic` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `PATCH /audience/topics/{topicId}` — Update a topic
op: `updateAudienceTopic` · body: UpdateAudienceTopicRequest { name, description, visibility } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/topics/{topicId}` — Delete a topic
op: `destroyAudienceTopic` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `GET /audience/properties` — List audience properties
op: `listAudienceProperties` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/properties` — Create a property
op: `createAudienceProperty` · body: StoreAudiencePropertyRequest { **name**, **type**, fallback_value } · errors: 401, 403, 409, 422, 500

### `GET /audience/properties/{propertyId}` — Show a property
op: `showAudienceProperty` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `PATCH /audience/properties/{propertyId}` — Update a property
op: `updateAudienceProperty` · body: UpdateAudiencePropertyRequest { fallback_value } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `DELETE /audience/properties/{propertyId}` — Delete a property
op: `destroyAudienceProperty` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `GET /audience/segments` — List audience segments
op: `listAudienceSegments` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `POST /audience/segments` — Create a segment
op: `createAudienceSegment` · body: StoreAudienceSegmentRequest { **name**, list_id, **conditions** } · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `GET /audience/segments/{segmentId}` — Show a segment
op: `showAudienceSegment` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `PATCH /audience/segments/{segmentId}` — Update a segment
op: `updateAudienceSegment` · body: UpdateAudienceSegmentRequest { name, list_id, conditions } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

op: `destroyAudienceSegment` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

## Campaigns

### `GET /campaigns` — List campaigns
op: `listCampaigns` · errors: 401, 403, 422, 500

### `GET /campaigns/{campaignId}` — Show a campaign
op: `showCampaign` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 500

### `GET /campaigns/{campaignId}/events` — List campaign engagement events
op: `listCampaignEvents` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /campaigns/{campaignId}/send` — Send a campaign now
op: `sendCampaign` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /campaigns/{campaignId}/schedule` — Schedule a campaign
op: `scheduleCampaign` · body: ScheduleCampaignRequest { **scheduled_at** } · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500

### `POST /campaigns/{campaignId}/unschedule` — Unschedule a campaign
op: `unscheduleCampaign` · errors: 401, 403, 404, 422, 500
